'''Golfhan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Caridan (species)|Caridan]] who served as ambassador for the government of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] during the end of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he supported the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]] during the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a galactic conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

{{Char-stub}}
